title: Recursive Description Generation
scenario: Generate a detailed, step-by-step guide on how to create a recursive function in Python. The guide should include a high-level overview, followed by a detailed explanation of the base case and recursive case. Include code examples and a description of the time complexity and space complexity of the function. Limit the output to 250 words.
constraints: Must include time and space complexity analysis

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets all the constraints (code examples, time and space complexity, word limit).
Verify the accuracy of the technical information (base case, recursive case, time complexity, space complexity).
Evaluate the clarity and readability of the guide.
